zh.lifeSummary: 當GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR於大約1275年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯 卡素時，她的父親Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children27歲，母親Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth23歲。她和Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她於1851年住在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。她去世於1330年在英國威爾斯安格萊享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR于大约1275年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯 卡素时，她的父亲Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children27岁，母亲Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth23岁。她和Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。她于1851年住在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根。她去世于1330年在英国威尔斯安格萊享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: HENDWR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from any of several places in Cornwall named Hendra, from Cornish hen dref ‘old homestead’.

variants.name: Hendra
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Hender  .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: MADOG
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

variants.name: Madog
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR was born about 1275, in Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth, was 23. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen. She lived in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom in 1851. She died in 1330, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR est née environ 1275, à Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen. Elle a vécu à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni en 1851. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR um 1275 in Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth 23. Sie hatte mit Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1851 hat sie in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1330 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR è nata il circa 1275 nel Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen. Vissuto a Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito nel 1851. Morì nel 1330, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWRが約1275年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウス カストルで生まれた時，父Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Childrenは27歳，母Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerthは23歳であった。彼女はEarl Gronwy ap Tudor Henとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1851年にはイギリスウェールズグラモーガンに住んでいた。彼女は1330年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR(이)가 대략 1275년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1851년도에 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 살았다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen. Ela viveu em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom em 1851. Ela faleceu em 1330, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR родилась около 1275 г. в местности монмоут кастл, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen. Она жила в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в 1851 году. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR nació aproximadamente 1275, en Monmouth Castle, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Madog ap Iorwerth 9 Children, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Madog ap Lorwerth, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen. Vivió en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido en 1851. Murió en 1330, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
